Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 1 152}Oh, wait, you're... the weird kid who comes by often.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 1 152}You're an odd one, to be this interested in antiques at your age.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16827 0 0}{f 5 21 1 152}...What was it? Sorry, my memory hasn't been great lately...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 1 152}Come visit again tomorrow. I'll try to remember by then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 1 152}Oh, wait, you're... the weird kid who comes by sometimes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 1 152}You're an odd one, to be this interested in antiques at your age.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 1 152}Come visit again tomorrow. I'll dig out something interesting for you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 1 152}Are you actually interested in antiques at your age?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 1 152}You're an odd one. Well, come visit again tomorrow or something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16806 0 0}{f 5 21 1 152}Come back again tomorrow when we're open.[n]{f 1 1}
